title: No More Template Crafting
description: Removes the ability to craft armor trims! Making them only found through exploration!!!
body:
Changes the recipe of templates diamond requirment to bedrock!

Making the armor trims more of a luxury by making them only able to be gotten by exploration and trading with other players!!!

Show off your swag by showing how much trims you collected! 

ALSO LIMITS NETHERITE SO NOW NETHERITE ARMOR/TOOLS CAN ONLY BE CRAFTED PER BASION FOUND >:)
